summary: This document outlines draft responses to due diligence questions from Khosla Ventures regarding KeepMeCompany's AI health-tech venture. It details the proposed agentic workflow technology, validation timelines for seniors and medical institutions, and key risks regarding safety and privacy. Additionally, it covers team qualifications and financial milestones required to reduce risk and secure financing.
